blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,858 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 35".
